name: Soda Cracker Chocolate Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 15 x 10 baking pan with foil and coat with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Place crackers in rows on the foil.
3. In a saucepan, melt butter. Add brown sugar and bring to a boil.
4. Boil for 3 minutes.
5. Pour over crackers and spread until completely covered.
6. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes. (Crackers will float)
7. Remove from the oven and turn off the oven.
8. Sprinkle chocolate chips and walnuts over the crackers.
9. Return to the oven until chocolate is melted, about 3 - 5 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven; using a greased spatula, press walnuts into chocolate.
11. Cut into 1 inch squares while still warm.
12. Cool completely; remove candy from foil.
Yield: about 5 dozen.
